subject: fix(scheduling): wire review findings through host screens + docs
body:
- Chat screens (mobile app/(app)/chat/[id].tsx + desktop ChatPanel.tsx) now
  pull realtimeDegraded from useScheduledMessages and forward it to
  ScheduledMessagesModal so the reconnecting banner appears when the
  sender-scoped realtime channel drops.

- utils/clearData.ts: before ending chats on "Clear All Data", soft-cancel
  any pending scheduled_messages the user owns. Prevents server-side
  queued sends from firing after the user has considered their identity
  gone. (endAllChats would have caused the dispatcher to mark them
  failed/chat_ended anyway, but explicit cancellation keeps the book
  clean and saves the dispatcher the work.)

- CLAUDE.md corrections:
  * Removed the false claim that the 30/min message rate limit applies
    naturally at dispatch time; it now applies because the dispatcher
    re-checks it explicitly.
  * Documented cancel as soft-cancel (was hard-delete).
  * Added the cleanup cron and the at-least-once delivery model.
  * Noted that dispatcher + cleanup functions are cron-only (REVOKEd
    from authenticated).
  * Extended the scheduled_messages schema section to cover the new
    BEFORE UPDATE trigger, cleanup index, and min-lead CHECK.

- docs/HISTORY.md: full review-cycle entry listing all fixed findings
  grouped by severity.

- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten for post-review state. Next session's
  only remaining task is applying the migration (supabase db push), then
  the smoke-test checklist.

Tags: scheduling, integration, docs, user-facing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: message-scheduling
Semver: patch
